sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmask (id UInt32, num UInt64, name String);
SELECT id, num, bitmaskToArray(num) AS bitmask_array FROM test_bitmask WHERE bitmask_array[1] = 1;
SELECT id, num, bitmaskToArray(num) AS bitmask_array FROM test_bitmask WHERE bitmask_array[2] IS NOT NULL AND bitmask_array[2] = 2;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT id, num, bitmaskToArray(num) AS bitmask_array FROM test_bitmask GROUP BY id, num HAVING bitmask_array[1] = 1) AS subquery GROUP BY id;
SELECT t1.id, t1.num, bitmaskToArray(t1.num) AS array_1 FROM test_bitmask t1 JOIN test_bitmask t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.num = t1.num;
SELECT bitmaskToArray(NULLIF(num, 0)) AS bitmask_array FROM test_bitmask WHERE num IS NOT NULL GROUP BY num HAVING bitmask_array[1] = 1;
SELECT id, bitmaskToArray(num) AS bitmask_array FROM test_bitmask WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_bitmask WHERE name LIKE 'fif%') ORDER BY id;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_bitmask AS SELECT id, bitmaskToArray(num) AS bitmask_array FROM test_bitmask WHERE num > 0;
ALTER TABLE test_bitmask ADD COLUMN extra UInt8 DEFAULT 0;
